_comment: VastAI instance template for ComfyUI provisioning. The framework wires itself into the image's PROVISIONING_SCRIPT hook (NOT --onstart-cmd, which bypasses workspace sync + supervisord). Set the four REPLACE_ME values, then `vastai create instance <offer> --image ... --env ...`.
_usage: vastai create instance <offer-id> --image vastai/comfy:v0.22.0-cuda-12.9-py312 --disk 200 --env "-p 1111:1111 -p 8080:8080 -p 8188:8188 -p 8288:8288 -p 8384:8384 -e PROVISIONING_SCRIPT=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ismail-kattakath/comfyui-provisioner/main/providers/vastai/onstart.sh -e HF_TOKEN=hf_... -e STACK_REPO=owner/your-stack" --ssh --direct
